name: Journal Downloader
description: Batch download PDFs from journal TOC pages + export TOC to Markdown with full title/DOI/links/abstract. Parsers: NEJM, Nature, Science, Lancet, BMJ. Hybrid abstract fetch: Crossref API first → HTML scrape fallback. BMJ parser (v3.6) groups articles by section heading (This Week / Research / Comment / Education / Obituaries); hasPdf permissive (most BMJ PDFs free); isOA reports green-OA flag.
